title: Find My Device - Main screen
scenario: Find My Device main screen displays map and headset list when accessed via Poly Studio Mobile app menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the app.
3. From the Home screen, tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon).
4. In the App Menu, tap "Find My Device".
5. If prompted with a location access permission dialog, tap "Allow" or "Grant" to enable location access.
6. Observe the main Find My Headset screen.
expected: The main Find My Headset screen displays a map and a list of connected/disconnected headsets.
